/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmainspace__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libmainspace__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/mainspace__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/mainspace/msg/to_stm_speed__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mainspace__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/mainspace/msg/position__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mainspace__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/mainspace/msg/desk__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mainspace__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/mainspace/msg/coffee__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mainspace__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/mainspace/msg/csv_file__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mainspace__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/mainspace/msg/command__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mainspace__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/mainspace/msg/pause__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
